name: Wirken: audit chain tamper detected
message:
Wirken's periodic chain-verify pass reported a hash mismatch.

Detection: chain_tamper (6)
Severity baseline: high

Fields to pivot on: @wirken.session, @wirken.detail.session_id, @wirken.detail.seq, @wirken.detail.expected_hash, @wirken.detail.actual_hash, @wirken.detail.verified_count.

Promotion to critical: when the alarm-log feed at @ddsource:wirken-alarm-log does NOT show a matching @session_id+@seq within +/-60s, the integrity break is undocumented and severity is critical. Wire this as a composite monitor with a 'NOT' clause once the alarm log is ingested as its own source (see datadog/README.md).

@security-team
